calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories & Request For Production Of Documents; And For An Order That The Genuiness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In Pl'S Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admited; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Resurgence Financial, LLC
Jon O. Buckenthal, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Plaintiff Resurgence Financial, LLC's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in the requests for admissions are deemed admitted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $240.
MODIFICATION. That compliance by 8/15/08 and monetary sanctions stayed pending compliance. The stay is to become permanent if defendant complies with the order to respond to interrogatories and request for production of documents. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories & Request For Production Of Documents; And For An Order That The Genuiness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In Pl'S Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admited; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Continued To Jul-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jon O. Buckenthal, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is vacated and Plaintiff Resurgent Financial, LLC's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is continued to Tuesday, July 29, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 610. Notice mailed to all parties. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
